---
image: img.png
title: Effect of Facial Expression Categories and Calculation Methods on Automatic
  Emotion Recognition
author: Damien Dupré
description: 5th International Workshop on Emotion Awareness for Pervasive Computing
  (EmotionAware 2021)
date: '2021-03-01'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

5th International Workshop on Emotion Awareness for Pervasive Computing (EmotionAware 2021)

:::
